description:
Users are unable to log in when using special characters in their password. This affects approximately 15% of users based on support tickets.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter username
3. Enter password with special characters (e.g., @, #, $)
4. Click login

Expected: User logs in successfully
Actual: Error message 'Invalid credentials'

Environment: Production
Browser: All browsers affected
